About Ejago

The Agency That Got
Tired of Agencies.

We started Ejago because we kept watching the same story repeat: founders hire a dev shop, then an ad agency, then an AI consultant — and end up with three vendors, zero integration, and a lot of missed calls.

We decided to be the last agency you'd ever need. One team. Every growth lever. Built to work together.

Our Story

From Web Shop to
Convergence Agency

Ejago started in 2020 as a standard web development shop — we built websites, we shipped on time, we were good at it. But every client told us the same thing: "Can you also run our ads?" Then: "Can you also automate our ops?"

Instead of saying no, we said yes — and then we figured out how to say yes well. We started hiring ads specialists. Then AI engineers. We stopped treating websites and ad campaigns as separate disciplines and started treating them as one system.

The insight that changed everything: your ad data should inform your product, and your product should generate data for your ads. When those two things work together, growth becomes compounding instead of exhausting.

Today, Ejago is the only agency in Los Angeles that builds the full stack — product, AI, and paid media — and actually makes them work as one machine.

2020
Founded in Los Angeles
60+
Projects delivered
12
Team members
4
Avg. years per client

How We Work

Four Principles We Don't Compromise On

🚀

Ship or Don't

We're not a consultancy. We build. If it's not in production, it doesn't count. We measure success by outcomes shipped, not decks presented.

🧠

AI That's Real

We don't bolt ChatGPT onto a spreadsheet and call it AI automation. Every system we build is designed to actually replace manual work — end to end.

⚡

Full-Stack Thinking

Your website talks to your CRM. Your ads talk to your analytics. Your AI talks to both. Everything we build is built to work together — because that's where the compounding is.

🔍

No Black Boxes

You'll always know what we're building, why we're building it, and what it's supposed to cost. Weekly updates. Transparent reporting. Always.

The Team

Real Humans. Real Builders.

Not a roster of names with fake titles. These are the people who will actually be working on your project.

IW

Indra Widjaja

Co-Founder & CEO

UCLA Computer Science & Engineering graduate. Built production systems at Microsoft (L62, MSN & Visual Studio), Amazon (SDE II, L5), T-Mobile, and Disney Consumer Products before founding Ejago. Co-founded Kompit — the official scoring platform adopted by the Indonesian National Olympic Committee across martial arts including Taekwondo, Boxing, and Pencak Silat. Kompit was acquired by Djarum, Indonesia's largest conglomerate (parent of BCA, the nation's largest bank). Currently runs Jago Hemat and KOI Designer Scrubs (apparel), co-owns Qubis (calories & nutrition tracking), Kompit, and holds equity in HelloCaddy. Volunteers at church. Plays piano and chess. Builds with the conviction that technology and performance advertising should compound together — not operate in silos.

Focus: Strategy, AI Architecture, Product Vision, Client Growth

LW

Lin Wei

Co-Founder & CTO

Former senior engineer at two YC-backed startups. Obsessed with developer experience and code quality. Runs the engineering and AI automation practice.

Focus: Engineering, AI Systems, Technical Direction

SC

Sarah Chen

Head of Performance

Managed $40M+ in ad spend across Google, Meta, and TikTok. Joined after Ejago cut their CAC by 60% in 90 days — couldn't resist joining the team that actually knows AI.

Focus: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Analytics

PS

Priya Sharma

Lead Designer

Design systems are her love language. Previously at a fintech unicorn. Brings premium UX thinking to every project — because beautiful and functional aren't opposites.

Focus: UI/UX Design, Design Systems, Brand

Los Angeles

Why LA Is Our Home

Los Angeles is where the smartest founders, creators, and brands are building right now. From Venice Beach tech startups to DTLA CPG brands to the world's most-followed creators — the companies shaping the next decade of culture are being built in this city.

We built Ejago here because we wanted to work with the companies that are doing things that have never been done. We're not interested in building another SaaS dashboard for a B2B software company. We're interested in the brand that hasn't launched yet, the product that doesn't exist, the growth system that hasn't been designed.

We work with founders who are serious about compounding. If that sounds like you — let's talk.

Let's Build Together

If you have a project, a growth problem, or just an idea you're kicking around — we'd love to hear it. No commitment required. Just a real conversation.
